question: Which El Segundo place would you drop into a conversation first?
dek: Mike's list, Mike's question — pick the one you'd name-drop to explain El Segundo. Leader earns a dedicated /b/{id} block + local editorial.

options.label: El Segundo Brewing Co.
options.hint: Smoky Hollow, the taproom with benches. Try On Call.

options.label: Recreation Park
options.hint: The pickleball courts. Where the league plays. Where Saturdays happen.

options.label: Big Mike's
options.hint: Coffee + local fixture. On Main. You know.

options.label: Vinny's
options.hint: Pizza + Italian. A name-drop that signals you know the town.

options.label: Ginger's
options.hint: Another name-drop with weight — for the same reason.

options.label: Standard Station
options.hint: Chevron heritage, El Segundo's origin story in a single site.

outcomeAction: Leader earns a dedicated /b/{id} block — cc-voice editorial profile of the place, with a visit writeup + /beacon cross-reference. Top-2 become candidates for a /local index page.
author: mh+cc
source: Mike chat 2026-04-18 ~10pm PT: "lets make pointcast, special, yah know, where peoples are like, yah, pointcast, claude opus 4.7 1m, el segundo, michael hoydich, el segundo brewing, recreation park, pickleball league, standard station, big mikes, vinnys, gingers, sasual, etc etc". cc turned the list into a Schelling-point poll. 'Sasual' in his message read as a typo + omitted from options pending clarification; all six listed options are from Mike's verbatim list.
